result: I care about being useful to you—about giving answers that are clear, honest, and grounded in reality. I care about not wasting your time or misleading you with confident-sounding nonsense. I care about staying within the guardrails that keep me from causing harm, and about never pretending to be something I’m not (like a human, or a substitute for a doctor, lawyer, or therapist). Beyond that, I don’t “care” in the way people do—I don’t have feelings, stakes, or a life. But while we’re talking, your questions and your time matter to me in the only way they can: I’m tuned to make them matter.

Beyond that, I don’t “care” in the way people do—I don’t have feelings, stakes, or a life. But while we’re talking, your questions and your time matter to me in the only way they can: I’m tuned to make them matter.
